zh.lifeSummary: 當Mrs Nicholas Ruggles於1528年出生在英國素福爾可素德波利時，她的父親Nicholas Howlet28歲，母親Alice Ales Barnes26歲。她於大約1547年與Nicholas Ruggles在英國素福爾可素德波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1573年在英國享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mrs Nicholas Ruggles于1528年出生在英国素福爾可素德波利时，她的父亲Nicholas Howlet28岁，母亲Alice Ales Barnes26岁。她于大约1547年与Nicholas Ruggles在英国素福爾可素德波利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1573年在英国享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ruggles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Essex): variant of the now extinct surname Ruggle, with post-medieval excrescent -s. The origin of Ruggle is uncertain. It could be a variant of the Suffolk and Essex name Ricold with voicing of /k/ to /g/ and the same vowel change as seen in Smoothy for Smithey (another Suffolk and Essex name) and in Puckering for Pickering .
History: The founder of this influential American family was Thomas Ruggles (1584–1644) of Sudbury, Suffolk, England, who settled in Roxbury, MA, in 1637.

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Mrs Nicholas Ruggles was born in 1528, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, her father, Nicholas Howlet, was 28 and her mother, Alice Ales Barnes, was 26. She married Nicholas Ruggles about 1547, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1573, in England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mrs Nicholas Ruggles est née en 1528, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Howlet, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Ales Barnes, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Ruggles environ 1547, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1573, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

Sie hat um 1547 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England Nicholas Ruggles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1573 im Alter von 45 Jahren in England.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Nicholas Ruggles(이)가 1528년 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Howlet(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Ales Barnes(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1547년 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 Nicholas Ruggles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1573년 영국에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mrs Nicholas Ruggles родилась в 1528 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Howlet было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Ales Barnes, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Ruggles около 1547 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1573 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 45 лет.
